requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety Evidence, SLBS Standards Context, and Coastal Hurricane / Salt-Mist Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109安全证据、SLBS标准背景及沿海飓风 / 盐雾降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109安全證據、SLBS標準背景及沿海颶風 / 鹽霧降額

summary.en: Saint Lucia's standards body is the Saint Lucia Bureau of Standards (SLBS), while renewable-energy projects operate in an Eastern Caribbean OECS / CARICOM tourism economy with policy interest in geothermal and solar generation. PV inverter safety files should include IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the supplied model or model family. Because many installations are coastal, exposed to hurricane winds, salt mist, heat, humidity, and sea-freight logistics through Port Castries, the safety file should also document enclosure rating, corrosion protection, surge protection, mounting constraints, thermal derating, storage and transport conditions, spare-parts strategy, and English installation / maintenance manuals suitable for local installers.
summary.zh: 圣卢西亚标准机构为Saint Lucia Bureau of Standards（SLBS），可再生能源项目处于东加勒比OECS / CARICOM旅游经济环境中，并受地热和太阳能发展政策推动。光伏逆变器安全文件应包括供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据。由于许多安装位于沿海，暴露于飓风、盐雾、高温、高湿以及经卡斯特里港海运物流条件，安全文件还应记录外壳防护等级、防腐蚀保护、浪涌保护、安装限制、热降额、储运条件、备件策略，以及适合当地安装人员使用的英文安装 / 维护手册。
summary.zht: 聖露西亞標準機構為Saint Lucia Bureau of Standards（SLBS），可再生能源項目處於東加勒比OECS / CARICOM旅遊經濟環境中，並受地熱和太陽能發展政策推動。光伏逆變器安全文件應包括供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據。由於許多安裝位於沿海，暴露於颶風、鹽霧、高溫、高濕以及經卡斯翠港海運物流條件，安全文件還應記錄外殼防護等級、防腐蝕保護、浪湧保護、安裝限制、熱降額、儲運條件、備件策略，以及適合當地安裝人員使用的英文安裝 / 維護手冊。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SLBS standards-adoption and conformity context — confirm applicable national adoptions and project requirements with Saint Lucia Bureau of Standards
Project-owner and insurer requirements for hurricane exposure, coastal salt-mist corrosion, surge protection, and thermal derating

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter safety documentation commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory test records, and voluntary CQC or CGC certificates. These China domestic documents may support engineering review but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates when a Saint Lucia project, lender, utility reviewer, insurer, or public procurement file requests IEC evidence. China domestic documentation may also omit Caribbean-specific environmental declarations for hurricane mounting, salt-mist corrosion, high humidity, surge exposure, English manuals, or Port Castries sea-freight handling.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂测试记录以及自愿性CQC或CGC证书。这些中国国内文件可支持工程审查，但当圣卢西亚项目、贷款方、公用事业审查方、保险方或公共采购文件要求IEC证据时，不能自动替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。中国国内文件还可能缺少针对加勒比环境的飓风安装、盐雾腐蚀、高湿、浪涌暴露、英文手册或卡斯特里港海运处理声明。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠測試記錄以及自願性CQC或CGC證書。這些中國國內文件可支持工程審查，但當聖露西亞項目、貸款方、公用事業審查方、保險方或公共採購文件要求IEC證據時，不能自動替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。中國國內文件還可能缺少針對加勒比環境的颶風安裝、鹽霧腐蝕、高濕、浪湧暴露、英文手冊或卡斯翠港海運處理聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification schemes for China PV inverter products

gap.en: Gap: China domestic safety certificates do not automatically satisfy Saint Lucia IEC-referenced safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports for the exact model family, environmental ratings and derating curves for 230/400 V, 50 Hz operation in tropical coastal conditions, salt-mist and corrosion declarations where applicable, surge protection coordination, hurricane-rated mounting assumptions, English manuals, and packing / storage instructions for sea freight through Port Castries. Confirm whether SLBS, LUCELEC, NURC, the project owner, or insurer requires additional evidence before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内安全证书不会自动满足圣卢西亚IEC参考安全要求。出口商应为准确型号系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告，提供230/400 V、50 Hz热带沿海条件运行的环境等级和降额曲线，适用时提供盐雾和腐蚀声明、浪涌保护协调、飓风等级安装假设、英文手册，以及经卡斯特里港海运的包装 / 储存说明。出货前应确认SLBS、LUCELEC、NURC、项目业主或保险方是否要求补充证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內安全證書不會自動滿足聖露西亞IEC參考安全要求。出口商應為準確型號系列提供IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告，提供230/400 V、50 Hz熱帶沿海條件運行的環境等級和降額曲線，適用時提供鹽霧和腐蝕聲明、浪湧保護協調、颶風等級安裝假設、英文手冊，以及經卡斯翠港海運的包裝 / 儲存說明。出貨前應確認SLBS、LUCELEC、NURC、項目業主或保險方是否要求補充證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory where IEC 62109 evidence, SLBS conformity review, LUCELEC interconnection, lender procurement, insurer review, or public-sector procurement is specified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and voluntary CQC / CGC certificates are China domestic evidence and are not automatically accepted for Saint Lucia IEC-referenced project files

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Saint Lucia PV inverter safety file should lead with IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence and environmental documentation for coastal, hurricane-exposed service. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and CQC / CGC certificates may be useful background, but they are not automatic substitutes for Saint Lucia IEC-referenced project evidence. Verify SLBS, LUCELEC, NURC, owner, and insurer expectations before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣卢西亚光伏逆变器安全文件应以IEC 62109-1/-2证据以及适用于沿海、飓风暴露使用条件的环境文件为核心。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CQC / CGC证书可作为背景资料，但不会自动替代圣卢西亚IEC参考项目证据。出货前请核实SLBS、LUCELEC、NURC、业主及保险方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖露西亞光伏逆變器安全文件應以IEC 62109-1/-2證據以及適用於沿海、颶風暴露使用條件的環境文件為核心。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CQC / CGC證書可作為背景資料，但不會自動替代聖露西亞IEC參考項目證據。出貨前請核實SLBS、LUCELEC、NURC、業主及保險方要求。
